highlights.title: Hindustan Copper share price jumps nearly 4% after strong Q4 results. Should you buy, sell or hold?
US stocks today: US stocks trade mixed as Treasury yields ease, oil prices retreat
Gland Pharma,6 stocks hit 52-week highs, rally up to 20% in a month
Global bond rout deepens as Iran war drags on and underscores inflation fears

Rs 3 a litre fuel price hike cuts losses by 25 per cent; daily loss drops to Rs 750 crore

Newsflow is mildly positive — 3 items in the last 48 hours — 'Block deal: JSW Energy sells Rs 3,150 crore JSW Steel stake to GQG, SBI Mutual Fund' (ET Markets) is the headline to watch. The tape is chopping sideways with 48% breadth. Stock-picking matters more than market direction here. Bull case: sustains above ₹1,293 and pushes towards ₹1,373 as trend followers pile in. Bear case: a slip below ₹1,242 triggers trailing stops and dents the short-term thesis. Above ₹1,293, the setup stays alive. ₹1,324 is the next hurdle. Verdict: BUY. Entry zone near ₹1,297 — speed matters. Outlook: Mildly Bullish → Mildly Bullish → Mildly Bullish.
